title: Florida Memory • Sunday performances at the 1994 Florida Folk Festival (Old Marble Stage) (Tape 3)
description: One digital audio tape (DAT). Storyteller Louis served as emcee. Louis and Fitchen told stories and sang to fill in for the scheduled gospel group Versiteers. Blues guitarist Book Binder lived in Polk City, and discussed the history of the songs he performed. Folklorist Stone introduced steel guitar
